description: Smoke test: verify that ralph-once.ps1 scaffolds and runs correctly end-to-end.

features.description: Create a hello.txt file containing the text 'Hello, Ralph!'
steps: File contains exactly the text: Hello, Ralph!

features.description: Append a timestamp line to hello.txt
steps: Second line matches pattern: Timestamp: YYYY-MM-DD

feedback_loops: pwsh -Command "if (Test-Path test/hello.txt) { Write-Output 'types OK' } else { throw 'hello.txt missing' }"
pwsh -Command "Write-Output 'tests OK (no test runner in this scaffold test)'"
pwsh -Command "Write-Output 'lint OK (no linter in this scaffold test)'"
done_criteria: All features have passes=true and all feedback loops are green.
